meaning: n.敲弯钉头的工具,紧钳,夹子
examples: DNA fingerprinting has proved the clincher in this investigation.
But the clincher is the face.
The clincher was Bates's meeting with Andreessen.
Welsby repelled long-range efforts from Ian Clarkson and Mark Quayle before Whitehall's late clincher.
Substitute Alessandro Matri scored the clincher near the end as the hosts climbed to seventh.
